info.name: Memorial App API
info.description: Postman collection exported from the Laravel API routes in this project. All current API routes are protected by the `X-API-KEY` header. Examples were refreshed after the full API test suite passed.

request.description: Returns all non-deleted features ordered by newest first.

response.name: 200 Success

originalRequest.description: Returns all non-deleted features ordered by newest first.
Returns all non-deleted features ordered by newest first.

request.description: Creates a feature. `image` must be a JPG, JPEG, or PNG file up to 2 MB.

formdata.value: In loving memory of Daw Mya, whose kindness lives on in every family story.

response.name: 200 Success

request.description: Updates a collection and replaces its feature-image associations. This request uses Laravel method spoofing (`_method=PUT`) so multipart file uploads work reliably from Postman.
